_meta._purpose: Part A visual polish — per-layer background + ambient lighting tint. These are FINAL approved art-direction values (visual-polish brief), NOT TBD balance numbers, so they are not marked _balanced and must not be treated as tunable placeholders.
_meta._applied_by: src/world/LayerVisuals.gd (one world CanvasModulate, tweened 1.5s on descent; Core Hollow slow-pulses ±0.05 opacity)
_meta._note: background = viewport backdrop mood; ambient = hue the world tint pulls toward; opacity = how far (0-1). The CanvasModulate multiplies every world canvas item incl. the z=-100 backdrop gradient, so background + world retint together.
